hero.title: Earthquake Preparation Store
hero.subtitle: Prepare today for a safer tomorrow. High-quality certified emergency preparedness kits backed by EKYP Earthquake Technologies.

footer.affiliateLabel: An Affiliate of the Girişimci Türk Ecosystem
footer.affiliateNote: Deprem Market is the official e-commerce affiliate of the EKYP Earthquake Technologies project under Girişimci Türk, turning engineering solutions into accessible disaster-preparedness products for everyone.

sideMenu.copyright: © {year} EKYP Deprem Market. All rights reserved.

homeFeatures.heading: Disaster Preparedness Under EKYP Engineering
homeFeatures.subheading: Being ready save lives. Our products are engineered and selected for the extreme environments of emergency situations.
homeFeatures.card1Desc: Products vetted by EKYP Earthquake Technologies engineers for structural and life safety standards.
homeFeatures.card2Desc: For immediate readiness, your orders are packed securely and dispatched within 24-48 hours.
homeFeatures.card3Desc: Equipment that complies with disaster relief regulations and has passed rigorous stress tests.
homeFeatures.card4Desc: Advisory services for both personal prep and bulk institutional disaster readiness planning.

homeCorporate.heading: SURVIVING THE ISTANBUL EARTHQUAKE WITH ZERO CASUALTIES
homeCorporate.description: Deprem Market is the official e-commerce affiliate of the EKYP Earthquake Technologies project (depremtek.com) under Girişimci Türk. We turn the domestic, innovative disaster solutions developed by engineers into real products, equipping households and institutions with the most resilient gear against expected disasters.

offline.title: No internet connection
offline.description: You are currently offline. Pages you have already visited remain available, and this page reloads automatically once you are back online.
offline.hint: Tip: Add Deprem Market to your home screen so you can open it without internet during an emergency.

pwa.installBody: Add Deprem Market to your home screen — open it faster and reach it even offline in an emergency.
pwa.iosBody: In Safari, tap the Share button, then choose "Add to Home Screen".
